messages.content:
enhance the wording: Step 4: Tap on +/- to increase/decrease the stride, level and incline
Step 5: Or you can tap on the individual keyboard to input the specific value for the stride, level and incline
Step 6: Switch between the 1/4 track view (compact view) and track view (full view)Step 7: Tap on BPM to check the heart rates
Step 8: Tap on TIME REMAINING to access the information about the time remaining in your workout, the time elapsed or your current pace
Step 9: Tap on DISPLAY to select a view mode

Step 4: Tap on the +/- buttons to conveniently adjust the stride, level, and incline according to your preference.
Step 5: Alternatively, you have the option to directly input specific values for the stride, level, and incline by using the individual keyboard.
Step 6: Easily switch between the 1/4 track view (compact view) and track view (full view) with just a tap.
Step 7: Quickly check your heart rates by tapping on the BPM button.
Step 8: Access informative details such as the time remaining in your workout, time elapsed, or your current pace by tapping on TIME REMAINING.
Step 9: Customize your experience by selecting a preferred view mode with a simple tap on DISPLAY.

improve:  Step 3: Select between the HILL and INTERVALS modes for drawing your workout chart (HILL mode selected) 
Step 4: Tap on the +/- keys to adjust the workout time 
Step 5: Tap on the +/- keys to determine how many workout sessions are displayed in a time array of how many hours

Step 3: Choose between the HILL and INTERVALS modes to create your personalized workout chart (currently set to HILL mode).
Step 4: Easily fine-tune the workout time by simply tapping on the +/- keys.
Step 5: Determine the number of workout sessions displayed within a time array of hours by using the intuitive +/- keys.

are the statements logically correct:  Step 3: Select between the HILL and INTERVALS modes for drawing your workout chart (currently set to HILL mode) 
Step 4: Tap on the +/- keys to adjust the workout time (in minute)
Step 5: Tap on the +/- keys to determine the number of segments to display at an interval of the specified time 
Step 6: Tap on the </> keys to select the workout segments
Step 7: Tap on the +/- keys to adjust the incline of the selected segment (highlighted in the chart)
Step 8: Tap on the √ key to start the workout
Step 9:  The real-time workout data is displayed once the workout starts

Yes, the statements are logically correct.

Step 3: Selecting between different modes to draw the workout chart is a valid action, and specifying the current mode is helpful.
Step 4: Adjusting the workout time using +/- keys is a logical and intuitive method.
Step 5: Determining the number of segments to display at a specified time interval using +/- keys is a valid action.
Step 6: Selecting workout segments using </> keys is a reasonable step.
Step 7: Adjusting the incline of the selected segment using +/- keys is a logical action.
Step 8: Starting the workout by pressing the √ key makes sense.
Step 9: Displaying real-time workout data once the workout starts is expected and reasonable.
improve the statement

Step 3: Choose between the HILL and INTERVALS modes to create your personalized workout chart (currently set to HILL mode).
Step 4: Easily adjust the workout time by tapping on the +/- keys to match your desired duration (in minutes).
Step 5: Use the +/- keys to determine the number of segments to display at specified intervals in your workout chart.
Step 6: Select the desired workout segments by tapping on the </> keys for a customized workout experience.
Step 7: Refine your workout intensity by tapping on the +/- keys to adjust the incline of the selected segment, clearly highlighted in the chart.
Step 8: Begin your workout by pressing the √ key, taking you into action mode.
Step 9: As soon as your workout starts, get immediate access to real-time data, providing you with essential information throughout your exercise session.
what is the icon that has 9 dots arranged in a 3 x 3 style called?
The icon that has 9 dots arranged in a 3 x 3 style is commonly referred to as the "grid view" or the "app grid" icon. It is often used to represent an organized visual layout of app icons or options.
what is the icon that can maximize the playing picture called?

The icon that can maximize the playing picture is commonly referred to as the "fullscreen" icon. It is typically represented by a square or rectangle that is either empty or filled with diagonal arrows pointing outward to indicate expanding the picture to occupy the entire screen.
and what is the icon that exit the full-screen mode?

The icon that exits the full-screen mode is commonly represented by a square or rectangle with either an arrow pointing inward or two diagonal arrows pointing inward. It is typically known as the "exit fullscreen" or "minimize" icon. This icon is used to return the display to its original size or exit the full-screen mode.

please translate:  Step3：根据自身情况，调节AGE、WEIGHT、WORKOUT TIME、MAX INCLINE、MAX LEVEL、TARGET HEART RATE大小
Step4：点击+/-，调节所选中参数的大小
Step5：点击数字键盘，调节所选中参数的大小
Step6：点击开始按钮，进入训练界面
Step7: 开始自已的训练，在心率还未接近目标心率10bpm以内时，LEVEL每5s增加1直至设置的MAX LEVEL，LEVEL到达MAX LEVEL后，INCLINE开始每20S增加1，直至MAX INCLINE设定值

Step 3: Adjust the values of AGE, WEIGHT, WORKOUT TIME, MAX INCLINE, MAX LEVEL, and TARGET HEART RATE based on personal circumstances.
Step 4: Tap on the +/- buttons to adjust the selected parameter values.
Step 5: Tap on the numeric keypad to adjust the selected parameter values.
Step 6: Tap on the start button to enter the training interface.
Step 7: Begin your training. If your heart rate is not within 10bpm of the target heart rate, the LEVEL will increase by 1 every 5 seconds until reaching the set MAX LEVEL. Once the LEVEL reaches the MAX LEVEL, the INCLINE will start increasing by 1 every 20 seconds until reaching the set value of MAX INCLINE.

improve:  Step 3: Adjust the values of AGE, WEIGHT, WORKOUT TIME, MAX INCLINE, MAX LEVEL, and TARGET HEART RATE based on your own health conditionsStep 4: Tap on the +/- keys to adjust the selected parameter valueStep 5: Alternatively, you can tap on the individual keypad to input a specific value for the selected parameter
Step 6: Tap on the start key to enter the workout interfaceStep 7: After you start the workout, if your heart rate does not reach 10bpm below the target heart rate, the LEVEL will increase by 1 every 5 seconds until reaching the preset max. value. Once the LEVEL reaches the preset max. value, the INCLINE will start increasing by 1 every 20 seconds until reaching the preset max. value

Step 3: Customize the values of AGE, WEIGHT, WORKOUT TIME, MAX INCLINE, MAX LEVEL, and TARGET HEART RATE to align with your individual health conditions.
Step 4: Fine-tune the selected parameter value with ease by tapping on the +/- keys.
Step 5: Alternatively, you have the option to input a specific value for the selected parameter by tapping on the individual keypad.
Step 6: Begin your workout experience by tapping on the start key, giving you access to the workout interface.
Step 7: Once the workout is initiated, if your heart rate does not reach 10bpm below the target heart rate, the LEVEL will progressively increase by 1 every 5 seconds until it reaches the pre-set maximum value. Once the LEVEL reaches the pre-set maximum value, the INCLINE will start increasing by 1 every 20 seconds until it reaches the pre-set maximum value.

improve: Step 8: When your heart rate is within 15bpm of the target heart rate, an “APPROACHING” message will pop up on the screen.
Step 9: When your heart rate is within 10bpm of the target heart rate, a “BEGINNING” message will pop up on the screen. At this point, the LEVEL and INCLINE will stop increasing, and the device will commence to countdown to the preset WORKOUT TIME.

Step 8: As your heart rate gets closer to the target heart rate, a helpful "APPROACHING" message will appear on the screen when your heart rate is within 15bpm of the target.
Step 9: When your heart rate is within 10bpm of the target heart rate, an encouraging "BEGINNING" message will pop up on the screen. At this stage, the LEVEL and INCLINE adjustments will halt, and the device will commence a countdown to the predetermined WORKOUT TIME.

improve:  Step 10: When your heart rate reaches the target heart rate, the LEVEL decreases by 1 every 5 seconds. Once the LEVEL reaches the min. value of 1, the INCLINE decreases by 1 every 20 seconds until it reaches the min. value of 1.Step 11: When your heart rate is 12 bpm higher than the target heart rate or more, a pop-up window will appear displaying “STOPPING: HEART RATE EXCEEDING 12 BPM OF TARGET”

Step 10: Once your heart rate reaches the target heart rate, the LEVEL will gradually decrease by 1 every 5 seconds. When the LEVEL reaches the minimum value of 1, the INCLINE will start decreasing by 1 every 20 seconds until it also reaches the minimum value of 1.
Step 11: In the event that your heart rate exceeds the target heart rate by 12 bpm or more, a pop-up window will appear on the screen displaying the message "STOPPING: HEART RATE EXCEEDS 12 BPM OF TARGET." This serves as a notification to prompt you to take appropriate action.

transalte:  调节ROUNDS大小，每增加1，代表运动时间增加5min
Step5：选择训练强度，Rookie（菜鸟）、Semi-Pro(普通)、Champ(冠军)，训练中体现为LEVEL的阻力大小区别
Step6：点击开始按钮，进入训练界面

Adjust the size of ROUNDS, with each increase representing an additional 5 minutes of exercise time.
Step 5: Choose the training intensity level, Rookie (菜鸟), Semi-Pro (普通), Champ (冠军), which will be reflected in the varying resistance levels of the LEVEL during the training.
Step 6: Tap on the start button to enter the training interface.

improve:  When you tap on END WORKOUT, the time remaining for the workout will change to 2 minutes, both the level and incline will decrease by a half, and the stride will change to 20. After the countdown ends, the device will return to the Home screen

When you tap on the END WORKOUT button, several changes will occur: 
- The time remaining for the workout will automatically adjust to 2 minutes. 
- Both the level and incline settings will decrease by half. 
- The stride length will be updated to 20. 
After the countdown ends, the device will smoothly transition back to the Home screen.
